case_number: criminal revision application is dismissed as not

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Revision Application No.230 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(s) OF JUDGE(s) 1. For orders on office objection as at “A” 2. For hearing of main case 3. For hearing of M.A. No.17955/2024 ----------------------------------------- 14.04.2025 Mr. Tanveer Hussain Khattana, advocate for applicant Mr. Muhammad Mushtaq Qadri, advocate for respondent No.1 Mr. Tahir Hussain, A.P.G. --------------------------------------- At the very outset, counsel for applicant does not press the instant criminal revision application and seeks direction to the trial Court to decide the case of the applicant preferably within six months. Order accordingly. However, instant criminal revision application is dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
